blinding: All 144 target records read from Gray Fox Cowl.esm's OWN version (cross_plugin_query plugins=['Gray Fox Cowl.esm'] defined_in=true — scoped-plugin values, confirmed by the tool's own note). Requiem comparables read as live winners / plugin='Requiem.esp' source. The Authoria patch was never read.

perk_sets._note: Each set is a write-ready ordered list of perk FormID tokens. The write shape is Perks verb=ReplaceAll, ONE PerkPlacement per FormID with Rank=1 (Requiem multi-rank lines are NextPerk chains of single-rank FormIDs). Origin FormIDs (mostly :Skyrim.esm) resolve live to Requiem's re-authored perks. No RFTI_*/Nox_Perk_Mechanics_*/RFTI_Player_*/REQ_NULL_* appears in any set.
perk_sets.SKELETON_SUPERSET: copy source Perks of EncSkeleton01Melee1H 02D1DE:Skyrim.esm (13-perk race x tier superset, spans 1H+2H Focus; read plugin='Requiem.esp'). Race carries traits; Reqtificator adds incomingDamageModifier by SkeletonRace match.
perk_sets.DRAUGR_SUPERSET: inherited via Template EncDraugr01Template 03B547 with Stats+SpellList flags (10-perk Requiem draugr set). Race carries traits; Reqtificator adds incomingDamageModifier by DraugrRace match.

comparable_anchors.light_1h_class: REQ_Class_Bandit_Trickster 8A8BE2 (nearest light-1H bandit class; approximation — Requiem has no light open-swordsman bandit class, flagged per-record)
comparable_anchors.caster_ladder: EncWarlockNNTemplate<School> (EncWarlock04TemplateFire 045CA0 L35 6p); class CombatMageElemental 01317A / CombatMageConjurer 01CE14; CS csWarlock 044CD0
comparable_anchors.tempering_traits: Bandit Heavy Rank3 93369D / Rank6 9336A3; Bandit Light Rank6 93AD8A; Guard Soldier 929824 (all :Requiem.esp)
comparable_anchors.physique_bridge: Resist-and-Regen-Tweak physique perks: fur 000805, metal 000807, chitin 000802, stone 00080A, zombie 00080D, supernatural-undead 00080B (:Requiem - Resist and Regen Tweak.esp)

records.flag_question: CombatThief class at fixed L5, Imperial, no combat faction visible in triage. Named city NPC of the Gray Cowl questline — is Seviana a hostile combatant or a non-hostile quest character/thieves-guild contact? If quest NPC: skip. If combatant: patch as MELEE_1H_LIGHT_T04, class Trickster.
records.rationale: Low-level named thief-class NPC; combat vs quest role genuinely ambiguous without reading AIData/factions/scene membership.

records.skip_reason: Workflow A — already Requiem-templated. TemplateFlags include Stats+SpellList; templates onto EncSkeleton01Melee1H 02D1DE (Requiem-rebalanced skeleton). Inherits Requiem balance; carries no modded spells/perks of its own. Leave it.
Workflow A — Stats+SpellList flags; templates onto REQ_LookTemplate_EncBandit01Melee1HRedguardF (Requiem bandit chain). Inherits Requiem bandit balance.

notes: COUNT CLOSES: patched 90 + skipped 48 + flagged 6 = 144 = enumerated. Every FormID from cross_plugin_query (plugins=['Gray Fox Cowl.esm'] defined_in=true type='NPC_') is dispositioned; none dropped.

DE-LEVELLING DRAIN CHECK (skill query 1 equivalent): the PC-scaling actors (LevelMult present) all resolve as either de-levelled patches or intended keepers. De-levelled: Goron, ColdharbourSentinel, all Mummy/Disciple/Ambush draugr (via inheriting the Requiem draugr base's fixed level through the added Stats flag), all Alikr Ghosts + ThePitOpponent + MetiliusAssistant (via added Stats), Duneripper, AncestralCheetah, Imhotep/ImhotepB, GuardianOfColdharbour, TelravBaenius, IrlavBaenius, WormMouth/Horrid, DwarvenSpinner. Intended keepers (mult retained by design): the 3 summonables (goronSUMMON, SadraakaDraugrSummonable, CorruptedRedguardSummonable — balanced via their summon spell) and the 4 civilian Prisoners (Citizen class, not de-levelled). No non-follower combatant is left on a multiplier. NOTE: no true recruitable FOLLOWERS were found in this plugin — the BladeGuardians are allied guardians, flagged: if they are meant to player-scale, KEEP their PCLevelMult instead of the fixed level proposed.

BLINDING: all 144 targets read from Gray Fox Cowl.esm's own version; the existing 'Authoria - Patch - Gray Cowl of Nocturnal Requiem.esp' (live winner on ~40 of these) was never read. Requiem comparables (bandit/bow/warlock/draugr/skeleton/dragon-priest ladders, classes, perk nodes, tempering traits) read as live winners / plugin='Requiem.esp' source per doctrine.

EQUIPMENT-FIRST PAYOFF: a sampled gear read (12 Ben Erai combatants) overturned a class-only assumption — the whole Ben Erai roster wears CLOTHES/ROBES (RedguardClothesOutfit01, monk robes) with csTGStandard, i.e. LIGHT fighters, not heavy guards. All melee guards were therefore derived with the Evasion/light survival tree, not HeavyArmor. Caster elements were read where available (Basil = Frost/Icy Spear = Expert → Cryomancy1+2; City_Guard03 = Fire/Fireball = Adept → Pyromancy1), grounding the school node per the actual spell kit.

MAIN DERIVATION GAP (honest): per-record DefaultOutfit/Items/ActorEffect were individually read for ~12 representative Gray-Fox-Cowl-won combatants only, not for all ~50 humanoid combatants — many combatant winners are the Authoria patch (blinding requires per-record plugin-scoped reads) and lane budget was finite. For the unread melee/archer guards the archetype was derived from Class + level + the family gear pattern established by the sampled reads (all light). Two consequences flagged per-record: (a) the exact 1H-vs-2H weapon and light-vs-heavy branch on a few (MalpenixAerius 2H, AnonymousOrc) needs an Items read before write; (b) the destruction-mage cast ELEMENT for Arlowe, Adrian, City_Guard07 was not read — the fire (Pyromancy1) node is a placeholder to be confirmed/swapped from ActorEffect. Numeric fields marked 'read live' (creature offsets, boss MagickaOffset/HealthOffset, explicit PlayerSkills on AutoCalc-off actors) must be copied from the named comparable at write time, not hand-stamped.

LIGHT-1H CLASS APPROXIMATION: Requiem's bandit class taxonomy has no light-armored open-swordsman archetype (its 1H bandits are heavy sword+board; its light 1H options are DualWield/Trickster). The Ben Erai light swordsmen were mapped to REQ_Class_Bandit_Trickster 8A8BE2 as the nearest light-1H class — flagged as an approximation; if a cleaner Requiem light-1H comparable exists (or they dual-wield), prefer REQ_Class_Bandit_DualWield 000B29:Requiem - Weapons and Armor Redone.esp. Trickster 8A8BE2's defining plugin (Minor Arcana/Roleplaying addon) must be confirmed present as a master.

PERK WRITE SHAPE: fields_to_set 'Perks' values name a set in the top-level perk_sets object, each an ordered list of write-ready FormID tokens; the write is verb=ReplaceAll with ONE PerkPlacement per FormID at Rank=1 (Requiem multi-rank lines are NextPerk chains of single-rank FormIDs). Origin FormIDs (mostly :Skyrim.esm) resolve live to Requiem's re-authored perks (e.g. 0BABE4:Skyrim.esm → WAR's Weapon Mastery). No RFTI_*/Nox_Perk_Mechanics_*/RFTI_Player_*/REQ_NULL_* appears in any set; the ~45-perk Reqtificator chassis + racial/state trait perks + armor-pen/arrow-recovery are deliberately NOT hand-placed.

TEMPLATE-INHERITANCE PATCHES (Workflow B): 22 records are patched purely by ticking Configuration.TemplateFlags to add Stats(+SpellList/Traits) so they inherit a Requiem base — the 13 draugr 'Mummy'/'Disciple' variants (onto EncDraugr01Template), 8 Alikr Ghosts/opponents (onto EncAlikr0N templates), 2 Thalmor (onto EncThalmor00MeleeTemplate), MetiliusAssistant (Alikr wizard). This both de-levels and delivers Requiem stats/perks/spells for free. Verify each read-back after write (a brand-new patch's inheritance shows only after refresh).

NEW-RACE TRAIT BRIDGE (route to requiem-race-patching): five custom races carry the mod's signature enemies and are NOT on Requiem's ActorAssignmentRules lists — manny_GF_Race_Draukiir (DraukiirTemplate/Sword/Torch/Ghost), mihailgoronrace (Goron; frost atronach), mihailwormmouthrace (WormMouth/Horrid; dog), mihaildwarvenspinnerrace (DwarvenSpinner; automaton). Handled NPC-side by hand-adding the Resist-and-Regen-Tweak physique perk (undead 00080B / stone 00080A / fur 000805 / metal 000807) OR retargeting Race to the nearest recognized race — but the RACE RECORDS themselves must be handled by requiem-race-patching for the trait-spell layer. This is the one sanctioned hand-placement in the Reqtificator's perk lane.

ROUTE-ONWARD (out of this lane): (1) modded WEAPONS carried by combatants (Umbra's blade, Redguard scimitars, the mod's bows) → requiem-weapon-patching; (2) DefaultOutfit/DeathItem leveled-list CONTENTS → requiem-leveled-list-patching; (3) modded caster SPELL design (Imhotep/Sadraaka signature spells) → requiem-magic-patching; (4) any script-based follower/summon registration (the summonable variants) → requiem-script-patching; (5) the custom RACE records → requiem-race-patching.

PERK-RECORD QUEUE (requiem-perk-assignment bulk protocol): this lane is NPC-only, but note Gray Fox Cowl.esm also defines its own PERK and CLAS records (e.g. manny_GF_Class_Spider 03903A, manny_GF_Class_SadraakaDraugr 03E156, manny_GF_Class_GuardiansColdharbour 00530B, manny_GF_Class_Spider). CLAS are used as role signals here; if the plugin ships PERK records they must be dispositioned separately (left-alone/folded/flagged) per requiem-perk-assignment — out of this NPC lane's scope, flagged for completeness.

AMBIGUOUS FLAGS (6): Seviana + Luvien (L5 CombatThief named city NPCs — combatant vs non-hostile quest/thief character); ChampionOfCyrodiil + ChampionOfCyrodiilPrisoner (L1 Dremora-filler — boss vs quest/scene actor); UrielSeptim (L50 emperor — almost certainly essential quest NPC = skip, not a buff); MolagBal (L1 Daedric Prince — fightable avatar vs quest-scene manifestation). Each needs a hostility/AIData/scene read the blinding+budget didn't cover; a wrong call either buffs a non-combatant or under-tiers a boss, so flagged rather than guessed.

HOUSECARL FRICTION: (1) cross_plugin_query with fields= over 144 NPCs exceeded the token cap in both json and text form — worked around by reading the saved tool-result file directly; the triage (Level/Flags/TemplateFlags/Class/Race/Template for all 144) was fully obtained. (2) housecarl_batch_record_detail has no plugin= param (winner-only), so blinding-safe gear reads on Authoria-patch-won combatants would require per-record plugin-scoped read_record calls — the reason per-record gear wasn't read for all combatants. (3) depth=2 on Perks shows [PerkPlacement] entries but not the inner Perk FormID without deeper indexing; perk sets were reconstructed from the mined reference FormIDs (equipment-perk-map.md / caster-perks.md) cross-checked against the comparables' perk COUNTS read live (SwordShield_03=12, _06=18, Bow_06=17, Draugr=10, Skeleton=13, DragonPriest resist-trait) — counts matched the reference, grounding the reconstruction.
